English: 是否确认删除所有数据？
Others: Do you want to delete all you data?

English: 释放所有鬼魂（含自定义鬼魂）并重新捕获？
Others: Release all ghost including custom ghosts and catch them again?

English: 清除所有收集品，包括电视订阅、U盘、助手服装、灵异物品、钥匙和幽灵笔记残页？（需重新招募瑠美）
Others: Remove all collected items such as TV Subs, Pen Drives, Assistant Cloths, haunted items, keys & Ghostpedia Pages? (Ryomi Must be recruited again)

English: 丢弃所有通行令？之后需要重新购买才能前往不同地点。
Others: Throw Away all your travel Passes? You will need to buy them again to visit different sites.

English: 从零开始！金币将设为100，并移除所有装备。
Others: Begin from nothing! Both of your money will be set 100 and all equipment are removed.

English: 遣散所有招募角色，让月子重新担任助手？需要重新招募所有人。
Others: Kick all recruits and make Luna your assistant again? Will need to recruit everyone again.

English: 重置月子、藤森和樱井家的剧情线？
Others: Reset Questlines in Tsukiko, Fujimori and Sakurai Household?

English: 重置病院和街道的剧情线？如果温蒂可以成为卡车助手，月子将被移除，需要重新招募。
Others: Reset Questlines in Asylum and Street Level? If Kaori can become truck assistant Tsukiko will be removed and will need to be recruited again.

English: 重置常春大学的剧情线？
Others: Reset Questlines in Evergreen College level?

English: 重置阳光公寓的剧情线？
Others: Reset Questlines in Sunrays Apartments Level?

English: 为已捕获鬼魂重新随机
